description: Perform Object-Based Image Analysis (OBIA) on the Sentinel-2 true-color image located at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif to extract agricultural field boundaries. Use the Generic Region Merging tool with the Baatz & Schäpe algorithm to segment the image into contiguous superpixels based on spectral and spatial homogeneity. Configure the segmentation with a Scale Parameter of 20.0, Shape Parameter of 0.1, and Compactness Parameter of 0.5, ensuring all 3 color bands are included as source bands. Save the resulting segmented product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.dim and export the segmentation label band as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.tif.
